# More Typing

In [hpack-dhall-defaults][hpack-dhall-defaults], Greg Pfeil ([@sellout][sellout]) keeps a
selection of `.dhall` files that he imports into other projects. These provide a
lot of typing beyond what is required to interact with Hpack.

[hpack-dhall-defaults]: https://github.com/sellout/hpack-dhall-defaults
[sellout]: https://github.com/sellout

```{.pre filename=examples/sellout/defaults.dhall include=../examples/sellout/defaults.dhall start-line=1 end-line=11 code-line-numbers="true"}
```

These "defaults" in turn import from [/hall/package][hall-package] that is a
record with fields for Cabal, GHC, hpack and the [Haskell Package Versioning
Policy][pvp] (PVP), where the "hall" ($^{d}ha_{ske}ll$) is the corridor
connecting Dhall and Haskell.

[hall-package]: https://sellout.github.io/hall/package.dhall.html
[pvp]: https://pvp.haskell.org
